case_title: STEVEN HUANG ET AL VS. STEVEN ZELLER ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, STEVEN BENKIS, JUSTIN FOSTER, DAN SANDERS, BENJAMIN SUNG, ALAN HO, BILLY BRUNNER, JENNIFER CHANG, TOM CHU, HEIDI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZELLER, STEVEN PASSIVE ECOMMERCE,LLC $226,182.18 PRINCIPAL, $19,095.42 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $245,712.60, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
